title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer asks to remove the `r.Requeue` check at `keystone_controller.go:216` because there's no justification for adding it and the linter flags `r.Requeue` as deprecated.

code_comments.body: I don't see a reason why the check for `r.Requeue` was added here. The linter even complains that `r.Requeue` is deprecated. I suggest removing this again.
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed the `if r.Requeue { return ctrl.Result{Requeue: true} }` early-return branch from `shortestRequeue` in `keystone_controller.go`, updated the function's doc comment to drop the `Requeue: true` priority description, and deleted the `TestShortestRequeue_RequeueTrue` test from `keystone_controller_test.go` that exercised the removed code path.

resolution_summary: Removed the deprecated `r.Requeue` check from the `shortestRequeue` function in `keystone_controller.go` as the reviewer requested. The function doc comment was also updated to no longer mention `Requeue: true` priority semantics. The corresponding test `TestShortestRequeue_RequeueTrue` in `keystone_controller_test.go` was removed since it tested the now-deleted `Requeue: true` early-return branch.
